category.scope_note: Home and clinical medical device comparison.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia Medical Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国医疗器械进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國醫療器材進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China home and clinical medical device documentation against Saudi Arabia SFDA Medical Device Marketing Authorization (MDMA), device classification (MDIR Classes A–D), Authorized Representative, ISO 13485 QMS, IEC 60601-1 electromedical safety, clinical evidence, risk management, Arabic labelling, and UDI requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用/临床医疗器械文件与沙特阿拉伯SFDA医疗器械上市许可（MDMA）、器械分类（MDIR A–D级）、授权代表、ISO 13485质量管理体系、IEC 60601-1电气安全、临床证据、风险管理、阿拉伯语标签及UDI要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用/臨床醫療器材文件與沙特阿拉伯SFDA醫療器械上市許可（MDMA）、器械分類（MDIR A–D級）、授權代表、ISO 13485品質管理系統、IEC 60601-1電氣安全、臨床證據、風險管理、阿拉伯語標籤及UDI要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MDMA application, SFDA registration decision, QMS audit result, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and manufacturers should verify current SFDA device classification, MDMA requirements, Authorized Representative obligations, labelling, UDI, and post-market obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the Saudi Arabia market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MDMA申请、SFDA注册决定、质量体系审核结果、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和制造商在出货或将产品投入沙特阿拉伯市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行SFDA器械分类、MDMA要求、授权代表义务、标签、UDI及上市后义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MDMA申請、SFDA註冊決定、品質系統審核結果、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和製造商在出貨或將產品投入沙特阿拉伯市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行SFDA器械分類、MDMA要求、授權代表義務、標籤、UDI及上市後義務。

answer_first.en: SFDA Medical Device Marketing Authorization (MDMA), a Saudi-based Authorized Representative, ISO 13485 QMS certification by an SFDA-recognized body, and Arabic-language labelling are the primary new requirements beyond NMPA; devices already approved by founding regulators (US FDA, EU CE) may qualify for an expedited recognition pathway.
answer_first.zh: SFDA医疗器械上市许可（MDMA）、沙特本地授权代表、经SFDA认可机构颁发的ISO 13485质量管理体系证书及阿拉伯语标签，是NMPA之外的主要新增要求；已获创始监管机构（美国FDA、欧盟CE）批准的器械可申请快速认可通道。
answer_first.zht: SFDA醫療器械上市許可（MDMA）、沙特本地授權代表、經SFDA認可機構頒發的ISO 13485品質管理系統證書及阿拉伯語標籤，是NMPA之外的主要新增要求；已獲創始監管機構（美國FDA、歐盟CE）批准的器械可申請快速認可通道。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
